title: IRR: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company has a project with...
summary: Calculate the internal rate of return by finding the discount rate that sets NPV to zero.
prompt: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company has a project with cash flows of $50,000 for 5 years and an initial investment of $150,000. What is the IRR?

options.text: Payback ignores time value of money
The IRR is calculated to be approximately 20% using an IRR financial calculator

solution: The IRR is calculated to be approximately 20% using an IRR financial calculator.
